The RRB shall also indicate the name of the Nominee(s) in the Passbook/ Statement
of Accounts and TDR in such cases.

An RRB shall give wide publicity and provide guidance to deposit account holders,

This may include printing compatible messages on cheque book, passbook and

For the limited purpose of directions in this section, unless the context otherwise
requires, the following definitions shall apply:
(1) 'Customer' refers to a person who may be a depositor or a locker hirer or has
placed articles in safe custody with a bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply: (1) 'customer' refers to a person who may be a depositor or a locker hirer or has placed articles in safe custody with a bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered a valid discharge of an rrb's liability
controls.control_description:
A deposit account where a depositor had made nomination in terms of the provisions
of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or where the account was opened with survivorship
clause, the payment of the outstanding balance upon the death of the depositor(s) to the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) shall be considered a valid discharge of an RRB's
liability, provided:
(1) the RRB has exercised due care and caution in establishing the identity of the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) and the deceased status of the account holder(s) by
obtaining appropriate documentary evidence (physical or equivalent e-document);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered a valid discharge of an rrb's liability

controls.control_objective: To ensure affect the right or claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to the extent of the payment made to them
controls.control_description:
and
(3) it has been made clear in writing to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) that they would be
receiving the payment from the RRB as a trustee of the legal heirs of the deceased
depositor(s), i.e., such payment to them shall not affect the right or claim which any
person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to the extent of the payment
made to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to affect the right or claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to the extent of the payment made to them

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute a full and valid discharge of a bank's liability
controls.control_description:
Payment made to the nominee(s) / survivor(s), subject to the foregoing conditions,
shall constitute a full and valid discharge of a bank's liability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute a full and valid discharge of a bank's liability

Therefore, in such cases,

RRB shall not insist on production of legal documents such as Succession Certificate,
<image>
Letter of Administration, Probate of Will, etc., or seek any bond of indemnity / surety from
the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / third-party, irrespective of the amount standing to the credit
of the deceased account holder(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to insist on production of legal documents such as succession certificate, <image> letter of administration, probate of will, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure require submission of the following documents in such cases: (1) claim form, as given in annex v, duly signed by the nominee(s) / survivor(s)
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require submission of the following documents in such cases: (1) claim form, as given in annex v, duly signed by the nominee(s) / survivor(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow a simplified procedure for settlement of claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than the threshold limit
controls.control_description:
Keeping in view the imperative need to avoid inconvenience and undue hardship to
the legal heir(s) / claimant(s), an RRB shall follow a simplified procedure for settlement of
claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount payable, including
accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than the threshold limit,
provided
(1) a deceased depositor(s) had not made any nomination or in case of a joint account,
the account was without nominee / survivorship clause,
(2) there is no Will left behind by the deceased depositor(s),
(3) there is no contesting claim, and
(4) there is no order from a competent court in the knowledge of the RRB, restraining
the claimant(s) from receiving nor the RRB from making the payment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to follow a simplified procedure for settlement of claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than the threshold limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle the claim up to the threshold limit based on: (1) claim form, as given in annex vi, duly filled in and signed by the claimant(s) other than tho
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to settle the claim up to the threshold limit based on: (1) claim form, as given in annex vi, duly filled in and signed by the claimant(s) other than tho

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained in case of claims up to the threshold limit
controls.control_description:
No bond of surety from a third-party shall be obtained in case of claims up to the
threshold limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be obtained in case of claims up to the threshold limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle the claim based on: (1) succession certificate and documents mentioned at paragraph 329 (1) to (3) above
controls.control_description:
In cases where claim amount is above the threshold limit, an RRB shall settle the
claim based on:
(1) Succession Certificate and documents mentioned at paragraph 329 (1) to (3)
above;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle the claim based on: (1) succession certificate and documents mentioned at paragraph 329 (1) to (3) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure call for the documents at paragraph 329 (1) to (5) above

In such cases, the RRB shall call for the documents at paragraph 329 (1) to (5)
above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to call for the documents at paragraph 329 (1) to (5) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure also call for a bond of surety, as given in annex vii, from third-party individuals (which may include non-claimant legal heir(s)) who are acceptable
controls.control_description:
An RRB may also call for a bond of surety, as given in Annex VII, from
third-party individuals (which may include non-claimant legal heir(s)) who are
acceptable to the RRB and good for the claim amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also call for a bond of surety, as given in annex vii, from third-party individuals (which may include non-claimant legal heir(s)) who are acceptable

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle claims involving 'will' left behind by a deceased depositor on the basis of probate of will / letter of administration, as applicable, in addit
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall settle claims involving 'Will' left behind by a deceased depositor on
the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable, in addition to
documents mentioned at paragraph 329 (1) to (3) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle claims involving 'will' left behind by a deceased depositor on the basis of probate of will / letter of administration, as applicable, in addit

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be obtained from her / him
controls.control_description:
In cases where a person other
than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will, applicable documents shall also be
obtained from her / him.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be obtained from her / him

controls.control_objective: To ensure additionally call for the documents mentioned at paragraph 329 (4) and (5) above
controls.control_description:
In such cases, an RRB shall additionally call for the
documents mentioned at paragraph 329 (4) and (5) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to additionally call for the documents mentioned at paragraph 329 (4) and (5) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle claims on the basis of probate of will or letter of administration or succession certificate or court order / decree, as applicable, and the do
controls.control_description:
In case of contesting claims or dispute amongst the legal heir(s) and / or the
beneficiaries named in the Will of the deceased depositor, an RRB shall settle claims on
the basis of Probate of Will or Letter of Administration or Succession Certificate or Court
order / decree, as applicable, and the documents mentioned at paragraph 329 (1) to (3)
above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle claims on the basis of probate of will or letter of administration or succession certificate or court order / decree, as applicable, and the do

controls.control_objective: To ensure be entertained during the period the order is in force
controls.control_description:
Further, where there is an order from a Court restraining an RRB from making the
payment, the claim shall not be entertained during the period the order is in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be entertained during the period the order is in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered based on subsequent court order to that effect
controls.control_description:
The
settlement of claim shall be considered based on subsequent Court order to that effect.

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be insisted from a third party in cases falling under either e

controls.control_objective: To ensure return the same to the remitter with the remark 'account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s)
controls.control_description:
Post settlement of the deposit account(s), in case any credit is received in the name
of a deceased depositor, an RRB shall return the same to the remitter with the remark
'Account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to return the same to the remitter with the remark 'account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate a clause in the account opening form itself to the effect that in the event of death of the depositor, premature termination of term depos
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall incorporate a clause in the account opening form itself to the effect
that in the event of death of the depositor, premature termination of term deposits would
be allowed without any penal charge, even if the deposit is within the lock-in-period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to incorporate a clause in the account opening form itself to the effect that in the event of death of the depositor, premature termination of term depos

controls.control_objective: To ensure require the consent of the surviving depositors and the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint holder, in case of death of one of the depositors
controls.control_description:
Premature termination of term deposits opened jointly, with or without survivorship
clause, shall require the consent of the surviving depositors and the legal heir(s) of the
deceased joint holder, in case of death of one of the depositors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require the consent of the surviving depositors and the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint holder, in case of death of one of the depositors

controls.control_description:
However, in case of joint
accounts with survivorship clause, if a specific mandate is furnished by all the depositors
jointly to the RRB, either at the time of placing the term deposit or anytime subsequently
during the tenure of the deposit, then premature withdrawal option shall be allowed to the
survivors on the death of any of the depositors, without seeking the concurrence of the
legal heir(s) of the deceased joint deposit holder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to the survivors on the death of any of the depositors, without seeking the concurrence of the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint deposit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to get an order from the competent court under the provisions of sections 110 or 111 of the bharatiya sakshya adhiniyam, 2023
controls.control_description:
The nominee(s) / legal heir(s) of a missing person shall be required to get an order
from the competent court under the provisions of Sections 110 or 111 of the Bharatiya
Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to get an order from the competent court under the provisions of sections 110 or 111 of the bharatiya sakshya adhiniyam, 2023

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled as per the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect of a deceased customer
controls.control_description:
The claim in respect of such missing person shall be settled
as per the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect of a deceased
customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be settled as per the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect of a deceased customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained in lieu of the death certificate
controls.control_description:
In such cases, a copy of the court order declaring the civil death of the account
holder shall be obtained in lieu of the death certificate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained in lieu of the death certificate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained in lieu of death certificate or an order from a competent court declaring the civil death of the account holder for settling the claim
controls.control_description:
However, to avoid inconvenience
and undue hardship to the common person where the aggregate amount payable,
including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than ₹1 lakh or such
higher amount as may be fixed by an RRB, a copy of the First Information Report (FIR)
and non-traceable report issued by police authorities shall be obtained in lieu of death
certificate or an order from a competent court declaring the civil death of the account
holder for settling the claim.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained in lieu of death certificate or an order from a competent court declaring the civil death of the account holder for settling the claim

controls.control_objective: To ensure give access of the locker to such nominee(s) with liberty to remove the contents of the locker
controls.control_description:
If a sole locker hirer nominates an individual(s) to receive the contents in the locker
<image>
in case of her / his death, an RRB shall give access of the locker to such nominee(s) with
liberty to remove the contents of the locker.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give access of the locker to such nominee(s) with liberty to remove the contents of the locker

controls.control_objective: To ensure give access of the locker and the liberty to remove the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s)
controls.control_description:
In case the locker was hired jointly with the instructions to operate it under joint
signatures, and the locker hirers nominate any other individual(s), in the event of death
of any of the locker hirers, an RRB shall give access of the locker and the liberty to remove
the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give access of the locker and the liberty to remove the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the mandate in the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers
controls.control_description:
In case the locker was hired jointly with survivorship clause and the hirers instructed
that the access of the locker should be given to "either or survivor", "anyone or survivor"
or "former or survivor" or according to any other survivorship clause permissible under
the provisions of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, an RRB shall follow the mandate in
the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the mandate in the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that, the contents of locker
controls.control_description:
In case of a minor nominee, an RRB shall ensure that, the contents of locker, when
sought to be removed on behalf of the minor nominee, are handed over to the guardian
whose details have been provided in the nomination form.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that, the contents of locker

controls.control_objective: To ensure hand over the contents of the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the contents of safe deposit locker on behalf of such minor
controls.control_description:
If the details of the guardian
have not been provided in the nomination form, an RRB shall hand over the contents of
the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the contents of safe deposit
locker on behalf of such minor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hand over the contents of the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the contents of safe deposit locker on behalf of such minor

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained by an rrb for processing the claim in cases falling under paragraphs 340 and 341 above: (1) claim form, as given in annex v, duly signed b

survivor(s) and deceased status of the locker hirer(s) by obtaining appropriate
documentary evidence (physical or equivalent e-document);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, ensure the following before giving access to the contents to the nominee(s) / survivor(s): (1) exercise due care and caution in establishin

satisfied to the genuineness of the claim, the RRB shall correspond with the nominee(s)

The same shall be undertaken in the presence of the nominee(s)
and / or survivor(s) and / or their authorised representatives, two independent witnesses
(should not be employee or ex-employee of the RRB), the safe deposit vault custodian
and another employee of the RRB not associated with locker operations, and recorded
as per the inventory form given in Annex X.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken in the presence of the nominee(s) and / or survivor(s) and / or their authorised representatives, two independent witnesses (should not

of the contents of the locker to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / the person competent to

remove charges registered with any registry within a period of 30 days after full repayment
/ settlement of the loan account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to release all the original movable / immovable property documents and remove charges registered with any registry within a period of 30 days after full

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given the option of collecting the original movable / immovable property documents either from the banking outlet / branch where the loan account w
controls.control_description:
The borrower shall be given the option of collecting the original movable / immovable
property documents either from the banking outlet / branch where the loan account was
serviced or any other office of the RRB where the documents are available, as per her /
his preference.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given the option of collecting the original movable / immovable property documents either from the banking outlet / branch where the loan account w

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mentioned in the loan sanction letters issued on or after december 1, 2023
controls.control_description:
The timeline and place of return of original movable / immovable property
documents shall be mentioned in the loan sanction letters issued on or after December
1, 2023.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mentioned in the loan sanction letters issued on or after december 1, 2023

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a well laid out procedure for return of original movable / immovable property documents to the legal heir(s)
controls.control_description:
In order to address the contingent event of demise of the sole borrower or joint
borrowers, an RRB shall have a well laid out procedure for return of original movable /
immovable property documents to the legal heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a well laid out procedure for return of original movable / immovable property documents to the legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed on the website of the rrb along with other similar policies and procedures for customer information
controls.control_description:
Such procedure shall be displayed on
the website of the RRB along with other similar policies and procedures for customer
information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed on the website of the rrb along with other similar policies and procedures for customer information

controls.control_objective: To ensure communicate to the borrower reasons for delay in releasing of original movable / immovable property documents or failing to file charge satisfaction f
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall communicate to the borrower reasons for delay in releasing of original
movable / immovable property documents or failing to file charge satisfaction form with
relevant registry beyond 30 days after full repayment / settlement of loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to communicate to the borrower reasons for delay in releasing of original movable / immovable property documents or failing to file charge satisfaction f

controls.control_objective: To ensure compensate the borrower at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay
controls.control_description:
In case where
the delay is attributable to the RRB, it shall compensate the borrower at the rate of ₹5,000
for each day of delay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compensate the borrower at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay

controls.control_objective: To ensure assist the borrower in obtaining duplicate / certified copies of the movable / immovable property documents and shall bear the associated costs, in ad
controls.control_description:
In case of loss / damage to original movable / immovable property documents, either
in part or in full, an RRB shall assist the borrower in obtaining duplicate / certified copies
of the movable / immovable property documents and shall bear the associated costs, in
addition to paying compensation as indicated at paragraph 378 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assist the borrower in obtaining duplicate / certified copies of the movable / immovable property documents and shall bear the associated costs, in ad

controls.control_objective: To ensure be without prejudice to the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law
controls.control_description:
The compensation provided under these directions shall be without prejudice to the
rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be without prejudice to the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law

controls.control_objective: To ensure be complied with as expeditiously as possible but no later than april 1, 2026
controls.control_description:
Instructions issued vide these Directions shall be complied with as expeditiously as
possible but no later than April 1, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be complied with as expeditiously as possible but no later than april 1, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the conduct related aspects relating to: (1) the assaying procedure of jewellery, ornaments, or coins made of gold and silver ("eligible collate
controls.control_description:
The policy on lending against gold and silver collateral, as required in terms of
Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025 (herein
after referred to as 'the policy' in this section) / SOPs prepared under the policy shall
cover the conduct related aspects relating to:
(1) the assaying procedure of jewellery, ornaments, or coins made of gold and silver
("eligible collateral" for this section);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the conduct related aspects relating to: (1) the assaying procedure of jewellery, ornaments, or coins made of gold and silver ("eligible collate

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that a standardised procedure is put in place to assay the purity of gold and silver collateral, its weight (gross as well as net), etc
controls.control_description:
An RRB, which provides or intends to provide loans against eligible collateral, shall
ensure that a standardised procedure is put in place to assay the purity of gold and silver
collateral, its weight (gross as well as net), etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that a standardised procedure is put in place to assay the purity of gold and silver collateral, its weight (gross as well as net), etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adopted uniformly across all its branches for all assaying procedures, without any deviation
controls.control_description:
This procedure shall be adopted uniformly
across all its branches for all assaying procedures, without any deviation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adopted uniformly across all its branches for all assaying procedures, without any deviation

controls.control_objective: To ensure display on its website the methodology adopted by it for determination of net weight of the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral and the
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall display on its website the methodology adopted by it for determination
of net weight of the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral and the price used to
value the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral for determination of LTV ratio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to display on its website the methodology adopted by it for determination of net weight of the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral and the

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure presence of the borrower(s) while assaying the collateral at the time of sanctioning the loan
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall ensure presence of the borrower(s) while assaying the collateral at
the time of sanctioning the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure presence of the borrower(s) while assaying the collateral at the time of sanctioning the loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be explained to the borrower(s) and details incorporated in the certificate to be issued as per paragraph 389 below
controls.control_description:
The deductions relating to stone weight, fastenings, etc.,
as part of the assaying procedure shall be explained to the borrower(s) and details
incorporated in the certificate to be issued as per paragraph 389 below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be explained to the borrower(s) and details incorporated in the certificate to be issued as per paragraph 389 below

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recorded and communicated promptly to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s)
controls.control_description:
Post pledging, cases involving loss of gold or silver collateral and any deterioration
or discrepancy in quantity or purity observed during internal audit or otherwise including
at the time of return or auction of collateral shall be recorded and communicated promptly
to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recorded and communicated promptly to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be communicated to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s)
controls.control_description:
The process for making reimbursement or compensation
as per the policy or SOP shall also be communicated to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be communicated to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be standardised across all branches of an rrb
controls.control_description: Documentation shall be standardised across all branches of an RRB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be standardised across all branches of an rrb

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the description of the eligible collateral taken as security, value of such collateral, details of auction procedure and the circumstances leading to the auction of the eligible collateral, the notice period which shall be allowed to the borrower for repayment or settlement of loan before the auction is conducted, timelines for release of pledged eligible collateral upon full repayment or settlement of loan, refund of surplus
controls.control_description:
The loan agreement shall cover the description of the eligible collateral taken as
security, value of such collateral, details of auction procedure and the circumstances
leading to the auction of the eligible collateral, the notice period which shall be allowed to
the borrower for repayment or settlement of loan before the auction is conducted,
timelines for release of pledged eligible collateral upon full repayment or settlement of
loan, refund of surplus, if any, from the auction of the pledged eligible collateral and other
necessary details.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the description of the eligible collateral taken as security, value of such collateral, details of auction procedure and the circumstances leading to the auction of the eligible collateral, the notice period which shall be allowed to the borrower for repayment or settlement of loan before the auction is conducted, timelines for release of pledged eligible collateral upon full repayment or settlement of loan, refund of surplus

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly included in the loan agreement and kfs
controls.control_description:
All applicable charges payable by the borrower, including those related
to assaying, auction, etc., shall be clearly included in the loan agreement and KFS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly included in the loan agreement and kfs

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare a certificate or e- certificate in duplicate on its letterhead regarding the assay of the collateral and state therein the purity (in terms of
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare a certificate or e- certificate in duplicate on its letterhead regarding the assay of the collateral and state therein the purity (in terms of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept as part of the loan documents and the other copy be given to the borrower under their acknowledgement
controls.control_description:
One copy of the certificate or e-certificate shall be kept as part of the loan documents and
the other copy be given to the borrower under their acknowledgement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept as part of the loan documents and the other copy be given to the borrower under their acknowledgement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in the language of the region or in a language as chosen by the borrower
controls.control_description:
All communication with the borrower, especially, the terms and conditions of the
loan, or other important communication which affects the interest of the borrower or the
RRB, shall be in the language of the region or in a language as chosen by the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in the language of the region or in a language as chosen by the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an employee of the rrb
controls.control_description:
For an illiterate borrower, important terms and conditions shall be explained in the
presence of a witness, who shall not be an employee of the RRB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an employee of the rrb

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that necessary infrastructure and facilities are put in place and appropriate security measures taken in each of its branches where loans are s
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall ensure that necessary infrastructure and facilities are put in place and
appropriate security measures taken in each of its branches where loans are sanctioned
against gold or silver collateral.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that necessary infrastructure and facilities are put in place and appropriate security measures taken in each of its branches where loans are s

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the gold and / or silver collateral is handled only in its branches and only by its employees
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall ensure that the gold and / or silver collateral is handled only in its
branches and only by its employees.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the gold and / or silver collateral is handled only in its branches and only by its employees

controls.control_objective: To ensure store the collateral only in its branches which are manned by its employees and having safe deposit vaults fit for storing gold and silver
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall store the collateral only in its branches which are manned by its
employees and having safe deposit vaults fit for storing gold and silver.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to store the collateral only in its branches which are manned by its employees and having safe deposit vaults fit for storing gold and silver

controls.control_objective: To ensure be extended by branches that do not have appropriate secured facility for storage of the pledged eligible collateral
controls.control_description:
Normally, such
loans shall not be extended by branches that do not have appropriate secured facility for
storage of the pledged eligible collateral.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extended by branches that do not have appropriate secured facility for storage of the pledged eligible collateral

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transported from one branch to another branch, only as permitted under paragraph 403 below or in case of shifting or closure of branch(es) or excep
controls.control_description:
The pledged eligible collateral may be transported from one branch to another
branch, only as permitted under paragraph 403 below or in case of shifting or closure of
branch(es) or exceptional reasons as per the process laid down by an RRB in terms of
its policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transported from one branch to another branch, only as permitted under paragraph 403 below or in case of shifting or closure of branch(es) or excep

controls.control_objective: To ensure periodically review the adequacy of systems for storage of the eligible collateral, conduct training of the concerned staff and carry out internal aud
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall periodically review the adequacy of systems for storage of the eligible
collateral, conduct training of the concerned staff and carry out internal audit of all
procedures to ensure that these are strictly adhered to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to periodically review the adequacy of systems for storage of the eligible collateral, conduct training of the concerned staff and carry out internal aud

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out periodic surprise verification of the gold and silver collateral pledged with it and shall maintain a record thereof
controls.control_description:
As part of internal audit, an RRB shall carry out periodic surprise verification of the
gold and silver collateral pledged with it and shall maintain a record thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out periodic surprise verification of the gold and silver collateral pledged with it and shall maintain a record thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included for obtaining consent of the borrower(s) to carry out surprise verification including assay of the pledged eligible collateral even in the
controls.control_description:
A clause in
the loan agreement shall be included for obtaining consent of the borrower(s) to carry out
surprise verification including assay of the pledged eligible collateral even in their absence
during the tenor of the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included for obtaining consent of the borrower(s) to carry out surprise verification including assay of the pledged eligible collateral even in the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specifically communicated to the borrower at the time of sanctioning the loan
controls.control_description:
This aspect shall be specifically communicated to the
borrower at the time of sanctioning the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specifically communicated to the borrower at the time of sanctioning the loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure release or return the pledged eligible collateral held as security to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) on the same day but in any case, not exceeding a
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall release or return the pledged eligible collateral held as security to the
borrower(s) / legal heir(s) on the same day but in any case, not exceeding a maximum
period of seven working days upon full repayment or settlement of the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to release or return the pledged eligible collateral held as security to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) on the same day but in any case, not exceeding a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be verified for correctness as per details in the certificate (as per paragraph 390) to the borrowers' satisfaction
controls.control_description:
At the time of release of pledged eligible collateral to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s),
the collateral shall be verified for correctness as per details in the certificate (as per
paragraph 390) to the borrowers' satisfaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be verified for correctness as per details in the certificate (as per paragraph 390) to the borrowers' satisfaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure give adequate notice to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s), as applicable, through available means of communication to repay or settle the loan dues prio
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall give adequate notice to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s), as applicable,
through available means of communication to repay or settle the loan dues prior to
<image>
initiating the auction procedure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give adequate notice to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s), as applicable, through available means of communication to repay or settle the loan dues prio

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept on record in both scenarios
controls.control_description:
A copy of the notice and acknowledgement thereof shall
be kept on record in both scenarios.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept on record in both scenarios

controls.control_objective: To ensure a period of one month has lapsed from the date of the public notice
controls.control_description:
In case an RRB is unable to locate the borrower(s) /
legal heir(s) despite best efforts and even after issuance of a public notice, it may proceed
with the auction, provided that a period of one month has lapsed from the date of the
public notice.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a period of one month has lapsed from the date of the public notice

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement a transparent auction procedure, which shall include, inter alia, announcement of the auction to the public by issue of advertisements in at
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall implement a transparent auction procedure, which shall include, inter
alia, announcement of the auction to the public by issue of advertisements in at least two
newspapers, one in the regional language and another in a national daily.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement a transparent auction procedure, which shall include, inter alia, announcement of the auction to the public by issue of advertisements in at

controls.control_objective: To ensure be auctioned by an rrb only through its employee having necessary experience and / or training or an auctioneer empanelled by an rrb as per its policy
controls.control_description:
The pledged eligible collateral shall be auctioned by an RRB only through its
employee having necessary experience and / or training or an auctioneer empanelled by
an RRB as per its policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be auctioned by an rrb only through its employee having necessary experience and / or training or an auctioneer empanelled by an rrb as per its policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place
controls.control_description:
In cases where auctions are conducted by the RRB through its
employees, necessary safeguards such as surprise visits by regional/ controlling officials
on periodic basis, coverage under internal audit, etc., shall be put in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 90 per cent of its current value
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall declare a reserve price for the gold and silver collateral at the time of
auction, which shall not be less than 90 per cent of its current value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 90 per cent of its current value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adopted
controls.control_description:
Provided that in case auctions fail twice, a reserve price not less than 85 per cent of its
current value shall be adopted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adopted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted physically in the same district in which the lending branch is located
controls.control_description:
The first auction shall be conducted physically in the same district in which the
lending branch is located.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted physically in the same district in which the lending branch is located

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct the auction in an adjoining district or conduct online auction
controls.control_description:
However, in case of failure of first auction, the RRB may
conduct the auction in an adjoining district or conduct online auction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct the auction in an adjoining district or conduct online auction

controls.control_objective: To ensure participate in the auctions to ensure that there is no potential conflict of interest
controls.control_description:
As a matter of policy, the RRB or its related parties shall not participate in the
auctions to ensure that there is no potential conflict of interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to participate in the auctions to ensure that there is no potential conflict of interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure mandatorily provide full details of the value fetched at the auction and the dues adjusted to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)
controls.control_description:
After the auction, the RRB shall mandatorily provide full details of the value fetched
at the auction and the dues adjusted to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mandatorily provide full details of the value fetched at the auction and the dues adjusted to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be refunded to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) within a maximum period of seven working days from the date of receipt of the full auction proceeds
controls.control_description:
The surplus, if any,
from the auction of the gold or silver collateral, shall be refunded to the borrower(s) / legal
heir(s) within a maximum period of seven working days from the date of receipt of the full
auction proceeds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be refunded to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) within a maximum period of seven working days from the date of receipt of the full auction proceeds

controls.control_objective: To ensure recover shortfall
controls.control_description:
An RRB may recover shortfall, if any, as per terms of the loan
agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recover shortfall

controls.control_objective: To ensure be borne by the rrb
controls.control_description:
In case of any damage to the pledged eligible collateral by an RRB during the tenor
of loan, the cost of repair shall be borne by the RRB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be borne by the rrb

controls.control_objective: To ensure suitably compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)
controls.control_description:
In case of loss of the pledged eligible collateral and / or any loss emanating from
deterioration or discrepancy in quantity or purity observed during internal audit or
otherwise including at the time of return or auction of collateral, an RRB shall suitably
compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to suitably compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay beyond the timeline prescribed at paragraph 397 above
controls.control_description:
In case of delay in release of the pledged collateral after full repayment or settlement
of loan by the borrower, where reasons for delay are attributable to an RRB, the RRB
shall compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay
beyond the timeline prescribed at paragraph 397 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay beyond the timeline prescribed at paragraph 397 above

controls.control_objective: To ensure communicate reasons for such delay to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)
controls.control_description:
If the delay is not attributable to
an RRB, it shall communicate reasons for such delay to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to communicate reasons for such delay to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue periodic reminders to borrower(s) / legal heir(s) through letters, email or sms if the email and mobile number are registered with the bank
controls.control_description:
Further, where the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) has not approached an RRB for release of
pledged eligible collateral after full repayment or settlement of loan, the RRB shall issue
periodic reminders to borrower(s) / legal heir(s) through letters, email or SMS if the email
and mobile number are registered with the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue periodic reminders to borrower(s) / legal heir(s) through letters, email or sms if the email and mobile number are registered with the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be without prejudice to the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law
controls.control_description:
The compensation provided under paragraphs 406 to 408 above shall be without
prejudice to the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable
law.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be without prejudice to the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as unclaimed
controls.control_description:
The pledged gold or silver collateral lying with an RRB beyond two years from the
date of full repayment or settlement of loan shall be treated as unclaimed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as unclaimed

controls.control_objective: To ensure periodically undertake special drives to ascertain the whereabouts of the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) in respect of such unclaimed gold and silver col
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall
periodically undertake special drives to ascertain the whereabouts of the borrower(s) /
legal heir(s) in respect of such unclaimed gold and silver collateral.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to periodically undertake special drives to ascertain the whereabouts of the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) in respect of such unclaimed gold and silver col

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put up to the customer service committee or the board, as the case may be, at half-yearly intervals for a review
controls.control_description:
A report on unclaimed gold and silver collateral shall be put up to the Customer
Service Committee or the Board, as the case may be, at half-yearly intervals for a review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put up to the customer service committee or the board, as the case may be, at half-yearly intervals for a review

controls.control_objective: To ensure refrain from issuance of misleading advertisements containing unrealistic claims to promote loans against gold or silver collateral
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall refrain from issuance of misleading advertisements containing
unrealistic claims to promote loans against gold or silver collateral.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refrain from issuance of misleading advertisements containing unrealistic claims to promote loans against gold or silver collateral

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all arrangements for sourcing and / or recovery of loans against eligible collateral, are in compliance with applicable instructions on ou
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall ensure that all arrangements for sourcing and / or recovery of loans
against eligible collateral, are in compliance with applicable instructions on outsourcing
and recovery practices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all arrangements for sourcing and / or recovery of loans against eligible collateral, are in compliance with applicable instructions on ou

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the instructions contained in the chapter on 'lending against gold and silver collateral' in reserve bank of india (regional rural banks
controls.control_description:
For prudential related aspects, the RRB shall be guided by the instructions
contained in the Chapter on 'Lending against Gold and Silver Collateral' in Reserve Bank
of India (Regional Rural Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the instructions contained in the chapter on 'lending against gold and silver collateral' in reserve bank of india (regional rural banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place by an rrb with the approval of its board
controls.control_description:
A Fair Practices Code (FPC) for microfinance loans based on these directions shall
be put in place by an RRB with the approval of its Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place by an rrb with the approval of its board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed by the rrb in all its branches and on its website
controls.control_description:
The FPC shall be displayed by
the RRB in all its branches and on its website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed by the rrb in all its branches and on its website

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued in a language understood by the borrower
controls.control_description:
The FPC shall be issued in a language
understood by the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued in a language understood by the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a standard form of loan agreement for microfinance loans in a language understood by the borrower
controls.control_description:
There shall be a standard form of loan agreement for microfinance loans in a
language understood by the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a standard form of loan agreement for microfinance loans in a language understood by the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide a loan card to the borrower which shall incorporate the following: (1) information which adequately identifies the borrower
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide a loan card to the borrower which shall incorporate the following: (1) information which adequately identifies the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in a language understood by the borrower
controls.control_description: All entries in the loan card shall be in a language understood by the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in a language understood by the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be with full consent of the borrowers and fee structure for such products shall be explicitly communicated to the borrower in the loan card itself
controls.control_description:
Issuance of non-credit products shall be with full consent of the borrowers and fee
structure for such products shall be explicitly communicated to the borrower in the loan
card itself.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be with full consent of the borrowers and fee structure for such products shall be explicitly communicated to the borrower in the loan card itself

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no pre-payment charge on microfinance loans
controls.control_description: There shall be no pre-payment charge on microfinance loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no pre-payment charge on microfinance loans

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applied on the overdue amount and not on the entire loan amount
